name: Exploit Attempt Followed By Cryptocurrency Mining Activity
notes: This rule triggers when an exploit or attack type activity is followed by cryptocurrency mining activity on the same host. This could indicate a machine infected by a malware or a misuse of a corporate asset.
conditions_text: when a subset of at least 1 of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Exploits Backdoors and Trojans, in any order, with the same source IP followed by a subset of at least 1 of these Successful Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining Host, Cryptocurrency Mining File Hash, Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Name, In-Browser Cryptojacking - JavaScript Filename in any order from the same destination IP from the previous sequence, within 15 minutes
thresholds: when a subset of at least 1 of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Exploits Backdoors and Trojans, in any order, with the same source IP followed by a subset of at least 1 of these Successful Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining Host, Cryptocurrency Mining File Hash, Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Name, In-Browser Cryptojacking - JavaScript Filename in any order from the same destination IP from the previous sequence, within 15 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Exploit Attempt Followed By Cryptocurrency Mining Activity on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when a subset of at least 1 of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Exploits Backdoors and Trojans, in any order, with the same source IP followed by a subset of at least 1 of these Successful Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining Host, Cryptocurrency Mining File Hash, Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Name, In-Browser Cryptojacking - JavaScript Filename in any order from the same destination IP from the previous sequence, within 15 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Exploit Attempt Followed By Cryptocurrency Mining Activity
Event description: Exploit activity followed by cryptocurrency mining activity on the same host
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
